title: Hey Nijame Lyrics in Tamil
stanzas: ENPT Song Hey Nijame Lyrics in Tamil(ஹே நிஜமே) by Karky. Hey Nijame Kalaiyathe track is sung by Bombay Jayashri. Wonderful lines ஹே நிஜமே கலையாதே கனவு நீ அல்ல பிரிந்திட வழி ஆயிரம் முயலாதே .

Hey Nijame Kalaiyathe Lyrics in Tamil ஹே நிஜமே கலையாதே
கனவு நீ அல்ல
பிரிந்திட வழி ஆயிரம்
முயலாதே

நெருங்கிட வழி ஒன்றை
நான் சொல்கிறேன்
இன்னும் கொஞ்சம்
பக்கம் வந்தால்
நான் சொல்கிறேன்
வா அருகவே

சுழலாதிரு உலகே
மீநிகழ்வொன்றிலே
வசிக்கிறேன்
முடிக்கா முத்தங்கள்
மிச்சங்களில் வாழ
சுற்றாதிரு சற்றே

காதல் நொடி நீல
பிரிவெல்லாமே
இது போல் மாறாதா
தெயாத பூப்பாதை
ஒன்றோடு நான்
ஓயாத காற்றாக
என்னோடு நீ

நிற்காத பாட்டாக
உன் காதில் நான்
வீழாத உற்ச்சாக
ஊற்றாக நீ

மாறாத இன்பத்து
பாலாக நான்
தீராத தீக்காமம்
ஒன்றாக நீ

தூங்காத உன் கண்ணின்
கனவாக நான்
தூரத்தில் இருந்தாலும்
பிரியாத நீ

வாசத்தின் வாசலில்
தோரணம் நான்.
வார்த்தைகள் தித்திக்கும்
காரணம் நீ

யாசித்து நீ கேட்ட
இரவாக நான்
யாருக்கும் தெரியாத
உறவாக நீ

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Hey Nijame?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, urging the beloved to come closer and cherish the moments together.

What is the context of this song in the movie Enai Nokki Paayum Thotta?

This song reflects the protagonist's feelings and desires, enhancing the romantic narrative of the film.

Who is the singer of Hey Nijame?

The song is sung by the talented Bombay Jayashree, known for her soulful renditions.

Who composed the music for Enai Nokki Paayum Thotta?

The music for the film was composed by Darbuka Siva, who has a unique style that blends traditional and contemporary sounds.

When was Hey Nijame released?

The song was released on August 30, 2019.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Hey Nijame, the protagonist expresses a yearning for closeness and connection, beautifully encapsulated through the soothing melody. The song serves as a pivotal moment in Enai Nokki Paayum Thotta, highlighting the emotional depth of love and the desire to cherish fleeting moments. With Bombay Jayashree's mesmerizing voice, the lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing. The heartfelt composition by Darbuka Siva complements the romantic theme, making it a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of Hey Nijame from the movie Enai Nokki Paayum Thotta, beautifully rendered by the soulful voice of Bombay Jayashree. This melody, crafted by the talented Darbuka Siva and penned by Karky, captures the essence of love and longing. Let the soothing lyrics and captivating tune take you on a heartfelt journey.
stanzaMeanings: Hey truth, don't fade away, you are not a dream, don't try to part ways, there are a thousand paths.
I will tell you a way to come closer, if you come a little further, I will tell you, come near.
Don't spin around, world, I am living in a fish event, don't end, live in the leftover pearls, don't wander a bit.
In the stream of love, you are the blue, won't this change? Like a divine flower path, you are with me as an unending breeze.
As a song that doesn't stop, I won't fall in your ears, you are like a pouring stream of joy.
As an unchanging sweetness, I am an unending desire, you are one with me.
As the dream of your awake eyes, even if I am far away, you won't part from me.
I am the entrance of the home, the reason words sparkle is you.
As the night you asked for, I am a relationship unknown to anyone.
